active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 0 baseline freeze over the real v3 public benchmark path; no behavior optimization; preserve v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in.

objective: Freeze a case-level LongMemEval/LoCoMo baseline and prove the current v3 public benchmark diagnostics are usable before later behavior changes.
scope: Read context_bundle.md before any other phase-local artifact.
Confirm active goal, phase binding, defaults, and current public benchmark diagnostic fields.
Run focused tests for agent kernel, public benchmarks, context composer, and evals.
Run or refresh 5-case v3 LongMemEval and LoCoMo no-LLM public smoke.
Run a 1-case opt-in kernel smoke with MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 only.
Write baseline_case_matrix.md with stable case IDs and failure taxonomy.
Write result.md and execute_review.md referencing the active goal and context bundle.
non_goals: Do not optimize retrieval, context composition, answer prompt, or kernel behavior in this phase.
Do not add Letta as a dependency.
Do not use benchmark case-id hacks or expected-answer leaks.
Do not modify state.json during this dispatch.
Do not enable the v3 kernel by default.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: If diagnostics are missing and production changes become necessary, add a focused failing test before changing src/. Otherwise Phase 0 should make no production code changes.
verification_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_agent_kernel.py tests/test_public_benchmarks.py tests/test_context_composer.py tests/test_evals.py -q

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase0_v3_lme_5case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase0_v3_locomo_5case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 1 --run-id phase0_v3_kernel_locomo_1case --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
usable_ack_checklist: baseline_case_matrix.md exists and references the active goal and context bundle.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo cases are separated with stable IDs.
Each case is classified as pass, retrieval miss, evidence hit but answer fail, context missing evidence, answer unsupported/overconfident, or judge questionable.
Reports expose memory_arch, v3_layer_counts, v3_budget_decisions, v3_diagnostics, and kernel_trace_events presence or absence.
Focused tests pass, or decision is not advance.
Full pytest and ruff pass before usable ACK.
v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in constraints are verified.
No behavior optimization is claimed as completed in Phase 0.
review_focus: Reject plan-only, demo-only, or partial completion.
Check that every lane artifact cites work/phase-0/context_bundle.md.
Check source grounding and failure classification are not conflated with aggregate pass rate.
Check LoCoMo failures are not hidden by LongMemEval results.
Check no benchmark leakage, case-id hack, or expected-answer leak was introduced.
Check state.json was not modified by the phase execution.
Check kernel remains opt-in and v1 fallback remains available.
